business.name: SkillNest
business.description: SkillNest is a practical, project-based online learning platform offering live computer, coding, and AI classes for school students in India (predominantly Class 6-8, Ages 10-14).
business.pedagogy: 100% Practical, project-based learning aligned with India's National Education Policy (NEP 2020).

pricingPolicy.text: Detailed program fee structures are shared transparently with parents during the free trial/demo session.

curriculumModules.name: Computer Basics
curriculumModules.description: Foundational operating system navigation, file structures, shortcuts, and inputs.

curriculumModules.name: Touch Typing
curriculumModules.description: Improving typing speed and finger posture to cross 40+ WPM.

curriculumModules.name: Coding (Scratch)
curriculumModules.description: Block-based coding teaching variables, conditional loops, functions, and game design.

curriculumModules.name: Generative AI
curriculumModules.description: Safe AI interaction, prompt engineering, data classification, and creative design tools.

curriculumModules.name: Spreadsheets (Excel)
curriculumModules.description: Formulas, calculations, data tables, and automatic data visualization charts.

curriculumModules.name: Presentations (PowerPoint)
curriculumModules.description: Designing slide masters, templates, transition pacing, and speech structure.

curriculumModules.name: Cyber Safety
curriculumModules.description: Password complexity, phishing detection, browser privacy, and cyber hygiene.

curriculumModules.name: Productivity Tools
curriculumModules.description: Google Workspace tools, margins, indexes, cloud files, and Canva graphic layouts.

institutionalOfferings.schoolPrograms: Syllabus alignment and lab setups for private/public schools.
institutionalOfferings.teacherTraining: Workshops to help school teachers instruct practical computer skills.
institutionalOfferings.csrIntegrations: Collaborations with corporates to deploy digital literacy labs in underserved areas.
